use_cases: Display animated view counts on landing pages for social proof
Show follower/subscriber metrics with visual flair
Present dashboard statistics with counting animation
Create engaging product hunt style metric cards
Display real-time updating counters for analytics
ai_summary: Animated stat counter card with a moving dot effect and smooth number counting animation. Displays formatted metrics (like view counts) with decorative visual elements including light rays and border accents. The component animates from 0 to a target value over a configurable duration, formatting large numbers with 'k' suffix. Designed for social proof sections and stats displays.
